long_description:
Collect memory usage for NG staging node dal1-qz1-sr1-rk084-s34, this is an effort to investigate for the problem documented in CIO-15533: https://ibm-iaas.atlassian.net/browse/CIO-15533.
Node - dal1-qz1-sr1-rk084-s34
Environment - DAL staging, Zone1

Please follow the below steps:
#Step 1
Install custom tools on the node
git clone git@github.ibm.com:Timothy-Smith1/node-memory
cd node-memory/src


#Step2
Run custom tools on the node
./lsnuma
./lsnuma-avail
./lsvfs
./lsvfs-up -v
./lsvfs-down -v
./lsqemu
./hostos-memory --summary
./hostos-memory --list-vm
./hostos-memory --list-procs
./hostos-memory --list-net
./hostos-memory --list-top50
./hostos-memory --list-qemu-brief
./hostos-memory --list-tmpfs
./hostos-memory --sort-procs
./hostos-memory --sched-info
./hostos-memory --list-containerd
./hostos-memory --list-numa


#Step3
Collect kube package history on the node
cat /etc/genesis/release_bundles

#Step4
Cleanup custom tools installed above
cd ../../
rm -rf node-memory
Incident source: INC10369668 - Subhashini S
